name: [GRIDHAND] Onboarding Agent - New client signup → welcome email + SMS + checklist

gridhand.scenario: New client signup → welcome email + SMS + checklist
gridhand.description: When a new client signs up for services at Platinum Fitness, a GRIDHAND workflow is triggered that sends a personalized welcome email via Mailchimp, an introductory SMS text message via Twilio, and a digital onboarding checklist shared through Google Drive, all within 10 minutes of completing the online registration form. This workflow provides a seamless and unified introduction to the gym's services, ensuring that every new client receives essential information, including membership details, class schedules, and facility access instructions, while also setting the stage for a comprehensive onboarding experience. By automating these initial touchpoints, Platinum Fitness can focus on delivering exceptional member experiences, increasing retention rates, and driving referrals, all while projecting a professional and organized image from the very start.
